title: stelis glaucus
intro: Stelis glaucus is a species of orchid native to tropical and subtropical regions, characterized by its grayish-green leaves and white, fragrant flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stelis glaucus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Stelis glaucus can be made by infusing the roots in hot water to create a tea, which is often consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
